summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Share Inquiry Form feature for KOLOR STUDIO. All 11 features verified successfully - Share Form button, modal display, copyable URL, Copy Link feedback, Email Link button, Open Form button, QR code generation, Download QR Code button, Pro Tips section, modal close (X and click outside), and enhanced empty state with share actions.
passed_tests: Share Form button visible in dashboard toolbar next to Add Lead
Clicking Share Form button opens the Share Form modal
Modal displays inquiry form URL (https://legal-agreements-1.preview.emergentagent.com/inquiry) in copyable input field
Copy Link button copies URL to clipboard and shows 'Copied!' feedback
Email Link button is visible and clickable (opens mailto)
Open Form button is visible and opens inquiry form in new tab
QR code SVG is rendered and properly displayed
Download QR Code button is visible and functional
Pro Tips section displays 4 helpful suggestions (Instagram bio, email signature, website contact page, business cards)
Modal closes when clicking X button
Modal closes when clicking outside overlay
Empty state (0 leads filter) shows share actions with Copy, Email Link, and More Options buttons
More Options button in empty state opens Share Form modal
Modal header has purple/violet gradient styling (from-violet-600 to-purple-600)
URL input has dark theme styling
QR code has white background for proper scanning visibility
Pro Tips section has violet-900/20 background consistent with dark theme
Inquiry form page (/inquiry) loads correctly with 'Start Your Project' heading
critical_code_review_comments: Share Form modal implementation is well-structured with proper data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
QR code uses qrcode.react library with high quality settings (level='H', size=160)
Copy to clipboard has proper error handling with fallback to document.execCommand
Email Link uses properly encoded mailto URL with subject and body parameters
Modal overlay click handler correctly uses event.stopPropagation() for inner content
Empty state in Dashboard provides excellent UX with immediate share options
Download QR Code function properly converts SVG to PNG with canvas at 512x512 resolution
seed_data_creation: No seed data required - used existing test user with leads; Empty state tested via search filter
context_for_next_testing_agent: Share Inquiry Form feature is complete and working. Modal includes: copyable URL input, Copy Link button with feedback, Email Link button (mailto), Open Form button, QR code with download, Pro Tips section. Empty state shows share actions when no leads match search. All interactive elements have data-testid attributes. Uses qrcode.react library for QR generation.
